title: arcgentic round-state
description: v0.1 schema for .agentic-rounds/state.yaml. The state.yaml file is the single source of truth for the current round and accumulated project history under the arcgentic plugin. All role skills and sub-agents read this file as their first action.

schema_version.description: arcgentic state schema version. v0.1 is alpha; will be promoted to v1.0 after MVP gates pass.

round_naming.description: Free-form description of project's round-id convention (e.g. 'phase.round[.fix]' or 'sprint.story' or 'epic.task'). Skills read this to format output correctly.

plans_dir.description: Project-relative path where handoff docs (= round plans) live.

audits_dir.description: Project-relative path where audit verdicts live (may use {N} placeholder for phase/sprint number).

refs_index.description: Project-relative path to the reference categorization index (e.g. references/INDEX.md). Optional; omit if project doesn't track external refs.

memory_store.description: URI or path to the project's persistent memory store (e.g. obsidian://VaultName, file:///path/to/notes, github://owner/repo).

tech_debt_registry.description: Project-relative path to tech-debt registry (e.g. docs/tech-debt.md). Optional.

verification_command.description: Project's standard verification command (run by verify-gates before commit, e.g. './scripts/dev.sh check' or 'npm test').

audit_check_command.description: Project's audit-fact verification command template. Use {file} as placeholder for the verdict file path.

id.description: Round identifier following project.round_naming convention. Empty string allowed in intake state before a round id is assigned.

artifact.description: Optional reference to artifact produced at this transition (e.g. 'docs/.../handoff.md@a15d5a4').

expected_dev_commits.description: How many commits this round expects (4 by default for entry-admin → design → dev → state-refresh chain; projects may override).

states.description: State-machine definition. Plugin ships defaults; project may override via init.

gate.description: Optional gate script path (relative to plugin scripts/gates/). Transition refuses if gate fails.

mandates.description: Project-specific mandates accumulated over time. The plugin ships default mandate hooks (e.g. reference-first); projects can extend.

location.description: Where this mandate is canonically defined (e.g. 'CLAUDE.md#section-8').

lessons.description: Project-specific lessons codified via codify-lesson skill. Each lesson tracks streak + novel-type observations.

streak.description: How many consecutive rounds applied this lesson successfully.

first_seen.description: Round id where this novel type was first observed.

last_application.description: Most recent round id where this lesson applied.

active_debts.description: Mirrored counts from tech-debt registry (if project tracks tech-debt).
